title: affaan-m/ECC
summary: ECC 是一个针对 AI 代理（如 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等）的 harness 性能优化系统。它集成了技能、本能、记忆、安全性和以研究为先的开发理念，旨在提升开发者的生产力和代理运行效率。该项目在 GitHub 上获得了超过 23 万星标，涉及 AI 代理、Anthropic、Claude、MCP 等热门技术主题。
summary_en: ECC is an agent harness performance optimization system for AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor, and beyond. It integrates skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development to enhance developer productivity and agent runtime efficiency. With over 232k stars on GitHub, it covers topics such as AI agents, Anthropic, Claude, MCP, and more.
